name: workspace-lite
description: MCP servers for Google Workspace via Apps Script proxy

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:packages
scripts.build:packages: tsc -b packages/drive packages/gmail packages/calendar packages/sheets packages/slides packages/docs packages/tasks packages/forms packages/cli
scripts.lint: eslint shared/src packages/drive/src packages/gmail/src packages/calendar/src packages/sheets/src packages/slides/src packages/docs/src packages/tasks/src packages/forms/src packages/cli/src tests scripts --ext .ts,.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm run validate:manifests && npm run validate:limits && npm run validate:responses && npm run validate:mutations && npm run validate:inputs && npm run validate:architecture
scripts.postinstall: npm run check:install && npm run build:shared
